name: Video element visual-only content has description track
description: This rule checks that description tracks that come with non-streaming `video` elements, without audio, are descriptive.
applicability_text: This rule applies to every [non-streaming](#non-streaming-media-element) `video` element that is [visible][] where the video does not contain audio and contains a `track` element with a `kind` [attribute value][] of `descriptions`.
